ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

entry.title: IDC 70CDCR20D00000009 (P00025) awarded to GEO GROUP, INC., THE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS LOS ANGELES

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO APPROVE A REQUEST FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT (REA) BASED ON THE DOL WAGE DETERMINATION 2015-5629, REV 28, IN SUPPORT OF DETENTION SERVICES OF ADELANTO ICE PROCESSING CENTER AND DESERT VIEW ANNEX.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
